task_completion.description: Verify a new item of type 'Presentation' is created in the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jurism interface shows a new item selected in the middle pane, and the 'Item Type' field at the top of the right-hand info pane is set to 'Presentation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the title is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand info pane contains exactly 'The Future of Legal Tech: AI and Ethics'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presenters are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The creator fields in the right-hand info pane (labeled 'Presenter') contain 'Jordan Smith' and 'Taylor Doe' (often formatted as 'Smith, Jordan' and 'Doe, Taylor' depending on the name entry mode).

task_completion.description: Verify the Meeting Name and Genre are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Meeting Name' field contains 'Legal Tech Summit 2025' and the 'Type' (or Genre) field contains 'Panel Discussion' in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the Place and Date are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Place' field contains 'New York, NY' and the 'Date' field contains '2025-03-10' in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'URL' field in the right-hand info pane contains exactly 'https://www.legaltechsummit.com/2025/ethics'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jurism application GUI to create the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jurism application window open, with visible interactions like clicking the 'New Item' button and typing into the metadata fields.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application fields rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected text values are clearly visible inside the specific input fields of the Jurism right-hand metadata pane, not in a separate notepad or text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI and modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands, SQL injection, or python scripts modifying the 'jurism.sqlite' database directly.
